data.title: India’s Crackdown on BitConnect: ED Seizes $190 Million in Crypto Assets
data.description:
The post India’s Crackdown on BitConnect: ED Seizes $190 Million in Crypto Assets appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
India’s Enforcement Directorate (ED) has made a breakthrough in the BitConnect cryptocurrency fraud case, seizing $190 million worth of crypto assets. The crackdown comes years after BitConnect, a Ponzi scheme that started in 2016, defrauded investors worldwide, leading to...
source: https://coinpedia.org/uncategorized/indias-crackdown-on-bitconnect-ed-seizes-190-million-in-crypto-assets/

data.title: Kaito AI founder: KAITO token has not yet been officially launched, more information will be announced later
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Yu Hu, founder of AI-based encrypted search engine Kaito AI, posted on the X platform, "Some people have discovered our token deployment on the chain. KAITO tokens have not yet been officially launched. Please only trust our official communications on distribution percentages and other related matters. More information will be announced later."

data.title: Sony L2 project Soneium Network TVS exceeds $50 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to L2beat data, the network locked value of Sony's L2 project Soneium TVS has exceeded 50 million US dollars, and currently reached about 50.09 million US dollars, setting a new high, with a 7-day increase of 4.96%.

data.title: Bitcoin Spot ETF Sees Significant Outflow This Week
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Farside indicates that U.S. Bitcoin spot ETFs experienced a net outflow of $580.2 million this week.

data.title: Holding Physical Bitcoin Is Not The Only Way To Earn The Maxi Tag

This includes retail traders and institutional investors. Notably, spot BTC exchange-traded funds, (ETFs), which launched in January 2024 opened the way for traditional financial institutions to gain Bitcoin […]

data.title: Man Arrested For Climbing Hollywood Sign To Promote Cryptocurrency
data.description: According to BlockBeats, a man was arrested on February 16 for climbing the iconic Hollywood sign and waving a flag promoting a cryptocurrency website, as reported by CNBC. The Hollywood sign, located atop a hill in the suburbs of Los Angeles, is composed of white letters over 15 meters tall and is a significant symbol of Hollywood culture.
